_comment: Tier-2 for kratos geomechanics#: catalog listed 7 CL names; 5 of them ('LinearElastic2DPlaneStrain', 'LinearElastic3DLaw', 'ModifiedCamClay', 'MohrCoulomb', 'DruckerPrager') do NOT exist in the registered GeoMechanicsApplication binary. The real registered names are Geo-prefixed (GeoLinearElasticPlaneStrain2DLaw, GeoIncrementalLinearElastic3DLaw, GeoMohrCoulombWithTensionCutOff{2,3}D, ...). ModifiedCamClay and DruckerPrager have ZERO variants — those CL families are not part of GeoMechanicsApplication 10.4.2 at all. Verified via binary-string scan of libKratosGeoMechanicsCore.so.
